characters.name: Abuelo
characters.description: As seen in Animal See, Animal Do Abuelo is a recurring character for Gullah, Gullah Island. He was played by Manolo Villaverde. He is the grandfather of Armando.

characters.name: Binyah Binyah
characters.description: Binyah Binyah is a playful big yellow frog. He is oddly large and bigger than some of the human characters. Binyah Binyah can speak but often makes small croaks and noises. Binyah Binyah also starred in the show's spin-off,Binyah Binyah. "Binyah Binyah"Source Binyah Binyah has appeared in every episode ofGullah Gullah Island. His first appearance was in. His last appearance was in.

characters.name: Bryan
characters.description: Bryan is a character who appeared in Season 1-4 of Gullah Gullah Island.

characters.name: Chansome the Pelican
characters.description: Chansome the Pelican is a handsome purple Muppet pelican who debuted in 1996 during Season 3 as a semi-regular. He serves as a friend of Binyah Binyah Polliwog and a friend to Ron and Natalie Daise. He can also make usual pelican noises like whistling, squawking, and even gurgling. He appeared in almost every episode of Season 3, but by 1997, his roles were reduced to only occasionally appear, like in the episode "A Barrel of Laughs". He was performed by Muppet performer and founder of 3/Design Studio, Inc. (who built the Binyah Binyah Polliwog Muppet), Jim Kroupa.

characters.name: Simeon Alston
characters.description: Simeon Alston is the baby of the Alston family. He is played by the Daises' real-life son Simeon Daise.

characters.name: Vanessa
characters.description: Vanessa doing Jump In Jump Out Vanessa Alston is a character on Gullah Gullah Island played by Vanessa Baden. She is the niece of Natalie and Ron. Seeing as her last name is the same as the rest of her family, it is most likely that her father is Ron's brother. Vanessa is the only cousin/niece of the family to appear on the show. So it’s most likely that she is the only cousin.
